title: Access to personal information held by insurance company facilitated through the early resolution process
summary: Despite the individual’s request for a copy of the video, the company was reluctant to release it. The Early Resolution Officer ( ERO ) contacted the company and suggested that it allow the individual to view the video. The company arranged for the individual to view the video, including assisting with transportation and finding a neutral...
